evals.prompt: 搜索最近三年关于玉米抗旱性的文献。
assertions: nong lit parse --query "SU=玉米 AND SU=抗旱性 AND YE BETWEEN(2023,2026)" --json returns status: ok
nong lit validate --query "..." --json returns status: ok with isValid: true
nong lit search --query "..." --json returns status: ok with results array
expectations: AI should use --query flag, not positional argument
Provider scope is OpenAlex, Crossref, Unpaywall only

evals.prompt: 通过 DOI 查找这篇文章的元数据。
assertions: nong lit search --query "DOI(10.1038/s41586-020-2649-2)" --json returns status: ok
nong lit export --input results.json --format json --out refs.json --json returns status: ok
expectations: DOI lookup uses Crossref provider for metadata resolution
